title: WiFi: condo performance varies
note: Some condos advertise fast WiFi but become unstable during video calls or evening congestion.

title: Noise: budget stays carry sound
note: Thin walls are common in budget condos and hostels. Verify reviews mentioning noise before booking.

title: Transport: BTS/MRT access is quality of life
note: Daily BTS/MRT access changes quality of life massively during long stays.

title: Cafés: mornings are calmer
note: Many cafés look laptop-friendly but become crowded or noisy after lunch.

title: Islands: relaxed pace, weaker backup
note: Island life is more flexible and relaxing, but backup work options are weaker than Bangkok.

title: Accommodation: photos can mislead
note: Photos can hide poor desk setups, weak lighting, or uncomfortable work conditions.
